Localization.Description: A virtual machine with installed security software is disabled

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Virtual machine "{object.name}" with security software installed, which was found during a scan, is disabled
Failed to disable virtual machine "{object.name}" with security software installed, which was added manually
Virtual machine "{object.name}" with security software installed, which was added manually, is disabled
Failed to disable virtual machine "{object.name}" with security software installed, which was found during a scan
Virtual machine "{object.name}" with security software installed, which was added manually, is being disabled
Virtual machine "{object.name}" with security software installed, which was found during a scan, is being disabled
